story.iWant: FirebaseService'te retry mekanizmasını Common RetryService ile entegre etmek
story.soThat: push notification gönderimlerinde geçici network hataları ve Firebase API hatalarında otomatik retry yapılsın ve kritik bildirimlerin güvenilirliği artsın
story.tasks:
- Task 1: FirebaseService Dependencies Update (AC: 6.5.6.1) - Subtask 1.1: Constructor'a RetryService inject et - Subtask 1.2: Import statement ekle: import { RetryService } from '@/common/services/retry.service'; - Subtask 1.3: Private readonly property: private readonly retryService: RetryService - Subtask 1.4: Constructor'a ConfigService inject et - Subtask 1.5: ConfigService'den config değerlerini al: firebaseRetryMaxAttempts, firebaseRetryBaseDelay
- Task 2: Environment Configuration (AC: 6.5.6.5) - Subtask 2.1: .env.example dosyasına yeni variables ekle: FIREBASE_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS=5, FIREBASE_RETRY_BASE_DELAY=2000
- Task 3: FirebaseService Send Retry Integration (AC: 6.5.6.2) - Subtask 3.1: sendPush() method'u refactor et - Subtask 3.2: Wrap Firebase Admin SDK send() with RetryService - Subtask 3.3: Update logging (preserve existing logs) - Subtask 3.4: Error handling: Preserve existing error handling and Sentry tracking
- Task 4: Error Classification Logic (AC: 6.5.6.3, 6.5.6.4) - Subtask 4.1: Add error classification logic before retry - Subtask 4.2: Preserve existing error messages and Sentry logging - Subtask 4.3: Test error classification with different Firebase error codes
- Task 5: Logging Integration (AC: 6.5.6.6) - Subtask 5.1: Keep existing debug logs - Subtask 5.2: Keep existing error logs - Subtask 5.3: RetryService logging otomatik (context string ile) - Subtask 5.4: Preserve existing Sentry error tracking
- Task 6: Unit Tests - FirebaseService (AC: 6.5.6.7) - Subtask 6.1: Test file güncelle: src/modules/notifications/services/firebase.service.spec.ts - Subtask 6.2: Mock RetryService, Firebase Admin SDK, ConfigService - Subtask 6.3: Test: Push notification send successful on first attempt - Subtask 6.4: Test: Push notification retry on network error ('messaging/unavailable') - Subtask 6.5: Test: Push notification retry on server error - Subtask 6.6: Test: Push notification no retry for invalid token ('messaging/invalid-registration-token') - Subtask 6.7: Test: Push notification retry exhaustion - Subtask 6.8: Test: Sentry logging preserved during retry

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
AC-6.5.6.1: FirebaseService Dependencies Update - src/modules/notifications/services/firebase.service.ts güncellendi - Constructor'da RetryService inject edilmiş - RetryService (Story 6.5-2'den) import edilmiş: src/common/services/retry.service.ts - ConfigService inject edilmiş (retry configuration için)
AC-6.5.6.2: FirebaseService Send Retry Integration - sendPush() method'u RetryService ile wrap edilmiş - Firebase Admin SDK send() çağrısı retry ile sarmalanmış - Max attempts: 5 (critical communication), Base delay: 2000ms (external service)
AC-6.5.6.3: Error Handling - Firebase Specific Errors - Network errors: Retry (RetryService handles) - Firebase server errors (5xx, 'messaging/unavailable'): Retry - Invalid token ('messaging/invalid-registration-token'): Don't retry, throw immediately - Invalid message format (400): Don't retry, throw immediately - Quota exceeded (429): Retry (RetryService handles with exponential backoff)
AC-6.5.6.4: Error Classification Logic - Check Firebase error codes before retry - messaging/invalid-registration-token → throw immediately (skip retry) - messaging/invalid-argument → throw immediately (skip retry) - messaging/unavailable → let RetryService handle (retry) - Network errors → let RetryService handle (retry) - Preserve existing error messages and Sentry logging
AC-6.5.6.5: Environment Configuration - .env.example dosyasına yeni environment variables eklendi - FIREBASE_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS=5, FIREBASE_RETRY_BASE_DELAY=2000 - ConfigService integration with defaults
AC-6.5.6.6: Logging Integration - Preserve all existing debug and error logs - Preserve existing Sentry error tracking - RetryService automatic logging via context string
AC-6.5.6.7: Unit Tests - FirebaseService - Test file: src/modules/notifications/services/firebase.service.spec.ts güncellendi - Test scenarios: successful send, retry on network error, retry on server error, no retry for invalid token, retry exhaustion, Sentry logging preserved - Mock RetryService, Firebase Admin SDK, ConfigService
AC-6.5.6.8: Configuration Service Integration - ConfigService injected in constructor - Read retry configuration from environment with defaults

doc.title: Epic 6.5: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.snippet: FirebaseService'te retry mekanizmasını entegre etmek. Firebase Admin SDK send metodunu retry ile sarmalama. Max attempts: 5, Base delay: 2000ms. Error handling for invalid tokens (skip retry), network errors (retry), server errors (retry).

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.snippet: RetryService provides exponential backoff retry mechanism. Formula: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay. Context-based logging. Integration with external services (S3, Mail, SMS, Firebase). Error classification: 4xx client errors don't retry, 5xx and network errors retry.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.snippet: Retry mechanism handles transient failures automatically. Final failure throws last error. Non-retryable errors (4xx validation) should be detected and thrown immediately to skip retry. Configurable retry attempts and delays for different operation types.

doc.title: Story 6.5.5: Mail & SMS Services Retry Integration
doc.snippet: RetryService integration pattern: inject via constructor, wrap external service calls with executeWithRetry. Error classification: 4xx errors skip retry, 5xx/network errors retry. ConfigService integration for retry configuration. Exponential backoff: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay. Context string for logging critical for debugging.

doc.title: Story 6.5.2: Common Retry Service (Exponential Backoff)
doc.snippet: RetryService available at src/common/services/retry.service.ts. Exported from CommonModule. Usage: Inject via constructor. Method: executeWithRetry with options (maxAttempts, baseDelay, context). Logging: Each attempt, retry delay, success on retry, final failure.

code.reason: Current FirebaseService implementation with sendPush method, error handling (invalid-registration-token, unavailable), Sentry error tracking. This is the primary service to modify for retry integration.
Main method to wrap with retry. Currently handles Firebase messaging errors (invalid-registration-token, unavailable) with Sentry logging. Need to add retry wrapper while preserving error handling.
Common retry service with exponential backoff from Story 6.5-2. Provides executeWithRetry method. This is the service to inject into FirebaseService.

Existing unit tests for FirebaseService. Tests: initialization, sendPush success, invalid token error, service unavailable error. Need to add retry-related tests while preserving existing test coverage.
Example of RetryService integration from Story 6.5-5. Shows retry pattern, error classification, ConfigService integration. Use as reference for FirebaseService integration.

Another example of RetryService integration from Story 6.5-5. Shows external API retry pattern, error handling, configuration management. Reference for implementing similar pattern in FirebaseService.

dependencies.reason: ConfigService for retry configuration (NEW dependency for FirebaseService)
Firebase Admin SDK for push notifications (existing dependency)
Sentry error tracking (existing dependency, preserve integration)

story-context.constraints:
1. **Service Integration Pattern:** - FirebaseService must inject RetryService via constructor - Use dependency injection pattern (NestJS) - Import: import { RetryService } from '@/common/services/retry.service';
2. **Retry Configuration:** - Max attempts: 5 (configurable via FIREBASE_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS) - Base delay: 2000ms (configurable via FIREBASE_RETRY_BASE_DELAY) - Same as email/SMS services (critical communication) - Use ConfigService for environment variable management
3. **Error Classification (Critical):** - messaging/invalid-registration-token: Don't retry, throw immediately - messaging/invalid-argument: Don't retry, throw immediately - messaging/unavailable: Retry via RetryService - messaging/server-error: Retry via RetryService - Network errors (ETIMEDOUT, ECONNRESET): Retry via RetryService - Quota exceeded (429): Retry via RetryService
4. **Preserve Existing Functionality:** - Keep all existing error handling logic - Preserve Sentry error tracking (Sentry.captureException calls) - Maintain existing log messages and format - Keep FIREBASE_ENABLED=false skip logic - Preserve Firebase Admin SDK initialization
5. **Exponential Backoff:** - Formula: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay - Delay sequence: 0ms → 2000ms → 4000ms → 8000ms → 16000ms - First attempt: Immediate (no delay)
6. **Logging Requirements:** - Context string format: Firebase Notification: ${deviceToken.substring(0, 20)}... - Preserve existing debug logs (send start, success) - Preserve existing error logs (invalid token, failed) - RetryService handles automatic retry logging
7. **Import Organization:** - 8-group import order: Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events - RetryService import in Services group - ConfigService import in Libraries group (@nestjs/config)
8. **Testing Requirements:** - All existing tests must pass - Add new tests for retry scenarios - Mock RetryService, ConfigService - Verify Sentry logging preserved during retry - Test error classification (invalid token skip retry, network error retry)

interface.name: RetryService.executeWithRetry
Firebase Admin SDK - messaging().send()
ConfigService.get
Firebase Error Codes

tests.standards: Unit tests for FirebaseService use Jest testing framework with @nestjs/testing module. Follow Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA) pattern. Mock external dependencies: Firebase Admin SDK (admin.messaging().send), RetryService, ConfigService. Test both success and error scenarios. Verify Sentry error tracking preserved (Sentry.captureException calls). Test retry scenarios: network errors retry, invalid token skip retry, retry exhaustion. Existing tests at src/modules/notifications/services/firebase.service.spec.ts. Similar retry integration test patterns available in src/modules/mail/__tests__/services/mail.service.spec.ts and src/modules/sms/__tests__/services/sms.service.spec.ts.
tests.locations: - src/modules/notifications/services/firebase.service.spec.ts (existing test file to update) - src/modules/mail/__tests__/services/mail.service.spec.ts (reference for retry test patterns) - src/modules/sms/__tests__/services/sms.service.spec.ts (reference for retry test patterns)

test.description: Test: Push notification send successful on first attempt
test.approach: Mock RetryService.executeWithRetry to resolve immediately. Mock admin.messaging().send to return message ID. Verify sendPush completes successfully.

test.description: Test: Push notification retry on network error ('messaging/unavailable')
test.approach: Mock RetryService.executeWithRetry to simulate retry behavior. Mock admin.messaging().send to reject with 'messaging/unavailable' error. Verify retry is attempted (RetryService called).

test.description: Test: Push notification retry on server error
test.approach: Mock admin.messaging().send to reject with 'messaging/server-error'. Verify RetryService handles retry.

test.description: Test: Push notification no retry for invalid token ('messaging/invalid-registration-token')
test.approach: Mock admin.messaging().send to reject with 'messaging/invalid-registration-token' error. Verify error is thrown immediately without retry (check error classification logic).
Mock RetryService.executeWithRetry to reject after max attempts. Verify final error is thrown.

test.description: Test: Sentry logging preserved during retry
test.approach: Mock Sentry.captureException. Trigger error scenario. Verify Sentry.captureException is called with correct parameters (module, action, errorType tags).

test.description: Test: ConfigService integration for retry configuration
test.approach: Mock ConfigService.get to return custom retry values. Verify FirebaseService uses configured values (firebaseRetryMaxAttempts, firebaseRetryBaseDelay).

test.description: Test: Preserve existing tests (initialization, FIREBASE_ENABLED=false, Firebase not initialized)
test.approach: Ensure all existing tests continue to pass after retry integration. No regressions in initialization logic, disabled state handling, error handling.
